reason: The current gRefCOCO val annotation has zero single-target expressions and its val-loss checkpoint selection systematically suppresses count class 1.

primary.name: last
primary.definition: fixed epoch-20 training endpoint for every representation, fraction, and seed

reporting_rule: Evaluate and report both checkpoint policies for every representation/fraction/seed on both full test splits; do not select, tune, or hide a policy based on test outcomes.
